content: You can resume it later to continue collecting responses.

comment.text: This is the second sentence in the body of a dialog that appears when a user pauses submissions for a form. It informs the user that they can resume collecting responses later.

usage.context:

 </Text>

 id="pause-submissions-dialog_edit"
